name: Chocolate Cream Mousse
recipeInstructions:
4 Tablespoons Prepared low calorie topping
In a small bowl, combine the pudding mix and skim milk. Microwave at HIGH for 5-7 minutes, or until slightly thickened, stirring 2-3 times. Stir in the Grand Mariner and butter flavoring. Cover the top of the pudding with wax paper. Let cool. In another small bowl, combine the egg white and fructose. Whip until the egg whites form stiff peaks. Gently fold the pudding into the whipped egg whites. Spoon into serving dishes and chill. Serve with low-calorie whipped topping.
